description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang Docker image with a single build stage. Add a build job that runs in the build stage and includes a before_script that runs `go get google.golang.org/api/photoslibrary/v1 && cd $GOPATH/src/google.golang.org/api/photoslibrary/v1 && git apply $CI_PROJECT_DIR/patches/media-item-filename.patch`, then `cd $GOPATH/src`, `mkdir -p gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE`, `cd gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE`, `ln -s $CI_PROJECT_DIR`, and `cd $CI_PROJECT_NAME`. In the script step the job changes to `cmd/sync` and executes `./build.sh`. The job publishes the paths `cmd/sync/builds/*` and the file `system/gphotosync@.service` as artifacts.
